title: Digital Property
description: Domains, hosting, email, and the infrastructure you actually own ... the digital property layer that keeps your business running no matter what changes around it.
intro: Digital property is the foundation everything else rests on. A domain you control, a hosting environment you can move, an email list you can export ... these are not technical details. They are the difference between a business that survives platform changes and one that does not. Start here before you build anything else.

seo.title: Digital Property ... Digital Independence ... Krisada.com
seo.description: Domains, hosting, and the digital property layer of your online business ... what to own, how to own it, and why it matters.
